/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/shell.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/builtins.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/command.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/executor.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/external.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/shell_path.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/src/tokenizer.c.o -o shell  -lreadline
